questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司计划将应用程序迁移到 AWS 云。在系统审核期间，该公司发现其内容管理系统（CMS）应用程序与云环境不兼容。哪些迁移策略将帮助公司以最少的努力迁移 CMS 应用程序？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate applications to the AWS Cloud. During a system audit, the company finds that its content management system (CMS) application is incompatible with cloud environments. Which migration strategies will help the company to migrate the CMS application with the LEAST effort? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 退休
A.en: Retire

B.zh: 重新主持
B.en: Rehost

C.zh: 回购
C.en: Repurchase

D.zh: 平台重构
D.en: Replatform

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：指停止使用某些应用程序或服务。如果 CMS 应用程序对业务至关重要，则直接停用并不合适，因此此选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to stopping the use of certain applications or services. If the CMS application is business critical, direct retirement is not appropriate and therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：（「Lift and Shift」）是将应用程序直接迁移到云环境，无需对其进行任何修改。这种方法通常是最简单、最省力的迁移策略之一，因此这个选项也是如此。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: ("Lift and Shift") is the direct migration of an application to a cloud environment without any modifications to it. This approach is generally one of the simplest, least effort migration strategies, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：回购 是指用云现成的解决方案取代现有应用程序，例如购买SaaS服务。这种方法避免了复杂的兼容性问题，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: refers to replacing existing applications with ready-made solutions in the cloud, such as purchasing SaaS services. This approach avoids complex compatibility issues, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：ing 是指对应用程序进行轻微修改以使其适应云环境。此方法需要一些开发工作，因此不符合「最小工作量」要求。该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: ing refers to making slight modifications to an application to adapt it to a cloud environment. This method requires some development effort and therefore does not meet the "minimum effort" requirement. This option is.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：重构 是指对应用程序进行重大修改或重新设计以适应云环境。这种方法通常是最复杂和耗时的，因此它不满足「最少努力」的要求，并且是一个不正确的选择。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the significant modification or redesign of an application to adapt to the cloud environment. This method is usually the most complex and time-consuming, so it does not meet the "least effort" requirement and is an incorrect option.

answer_text.zh: B. 重新主持；C. 回购

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BC (34%) CD (26%) AC (23%) Other。热门讨论与考点摘要：（「Lift and Shift」）是将应用程序直接迁移到云环境，无需对其进行任何修改。这种方法通常是最简单、最省力的迁移策略之一，因此这个选项也是如此。；回购 是指用云现成的解决方案取代现有应用程序，例如购买SaaS服务。这种方法避免了复杂的兼容性问题，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (34%) CD (26%) AC (23%) Other. Popular discussion and key point summary: ("Lift and Shift") is the direct migration of an application to a cloud environment without any modifications to it. This approach is generally one of the simplest, least effort migration strategies, so this option is.; refers to replacing existing applications with ready-made solutions in the cloud, such as purchasing SaaS services. This approach avoids complex compatibility issues, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 下列哪些是关于使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 的 AWS 最佳实践建议？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are AWS best practice recommendations for the use of AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS 账户根用户进行日常访问。
A.en: Use the AWS account root user for daily access.

B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上使用访问密钥和秘密访问密钥。
B.en: Use access keys and secret access keys on Amazon EC2.

C.zh: 定期轮换凭证。
C.en: Rotate credentials on a regular basis.

D.zh: 为系统管理员创建一组共用访问密钥。
D.en: Create a shared set of access keys for system administrators.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 最佳实践建议避免使用 root 用户进行日常操作，因为 root 用户拥有过多的权限，可能会导致安全风险。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS best practices recommend avoiding using the root user for daily operations because the root user has excessive privileges and may lead to security risks.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 建议使用 IAM 角色，而不是直接在 EC2 实例上使用访问密钥和秘密访问密钥，以避免密钥泄漏的风险。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS recommends using IAM roles instead of using access keys and secret access keys directly on EC2 instances to avoid the risk of key exposure.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：定期轮替凭证是 AWS 安全最佳实践，可以降低凭证暴露的风险。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Regularly rotating credentials is an AWS security best practice and can reduce the risk of credential exposure.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 建议为每个用户创建单独的 IAM 用户和凭证，而不是共用访问密钥，这样可以更好地追踪和管理权限。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS recommends creating separate IAM users and credentials for each user rather than sharing access keys, which allows for better tracking and management of permissions.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：设置 MFA 是 AWS 安全最佳实践，可为您的账户提供额外的保护层。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Configuring MFA is an AWS security best practice and can provide an additional layer of protection for your account.

answer_text.zh: C. 定期轮换凭证。；E. 设置多重身份验证 (MFA)。
answer_text.en: C. Rotate credentials on a regular basis.; E. Configure multi-factor authentication (MFA).

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：CE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：定期轮替凭证是 AWS 安全最佳实践，可以降低凭证暴露的风险。；设置 MFA 是 AWS 安全最佳实践，可为您的账户提供额外的保护层。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Regularly rotating credentials is an AWS security best practice and can reduce the risk of credential exposure.; Configuring MFA is an AWS security best practice and can provide an additional layer of protection for your account.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS 在 AWS 责任共担模式下负责哪个选项？
question_text.en: Which option is AWS responsible for under the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 网络与防火墙配置
A.en: Network and firewall configuration

B.zh: 用户端数据加密
B.en: Client-side data encryption

C.zh: 用户权限管理
C.en: Management of user permissions

D.zh: 硬件与基础设施
D.en: Hardware and infrastructure

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络和防御墙配置是客户的责任，因为客户需要根据自己的需求配置安全群组和网络ACL等资源。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network and defense wall configuration is the responsibility of the customer, because customers need to configure resources such as security groups and network ACLs according to their own needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：客户端数据加密是客户的责任，因为客户需要保证客户端的数据加密和解密操作。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Client data encryption is the responsibility of the customer, as the customer needs to ensure data encryption and decryption operations on the client side.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：用户权限管理是客户的责任，因为客户需要通过 IAM（身份和访问管理）来管理用户权限。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: User rights management is the responsibility of the customer, as customers need to manage user rights through IAM (Identity and Access Management).

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 负责管理底层硬件和基础设施，包括数据中心物理安全、硬件维护等。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS is responsible for managing the underlying hardware and infrastructure, including data center management security, hardware maintenance, etc.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 负责管理底层硬件和基础设施，包括数据中心物理安全、硬件维护等。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS is responsible for managing the underlying hardware and infrastructure, including data center management security, hardware maintenance, etc.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要运行一个图形查询来提供信用卡用户的姓名、地址和交易。该公司希望该图表能够显示姓名、地址和交易是否表明可能存在欺诈行为。哪种 AWS 数据库服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run a graph query that provides credit card users’ names, addresses, and transactions. The company wants the graph to show if the names, addresses, and transactions indicates possible fraud. Which AWS database service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon DocumentDB（与 MongoDB 兼容）
A.en: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)

B.zh: Amazon Timestream
B.en: Amazon Timestream

C.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
C.en: Amazon DynamoDB

D.zh: Amazon Neptune
D.en: Amazon Neptune

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DocumentDB 是一个文档数据库，主要用于存储和查询 JSON 格式的文档数据。它不适合处理图查询或关系复杂的图数据，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DocumentDB is a document database primarily used to store and query document data in JSON format. It is not suitable for processing graph queries or graph data with complex relationships, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Timestream 是一个时间序列数据库，旨在处理时间序列数据，例如物联网数据或应用程序性能监控数据。它不适合处理图查询，因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a time series database designed to process time series data, such as IoT data or application performance monitoring data. It is not suitable for processing graph queries, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一个键值和文档数据库，适合处理高性能NoSQL数据，但不支持图查询或复杂关系数据的处理，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a key-value and document database suitable for processing high-performance NoSQL data, but does not support graph queries or the processing of complex relational data, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Neptune 是专门为支持图查询和复杂关系数据处理而设计的图数据库服务。它非常适合处理涉及图结构的场景，例如社交网络分析或欺诈侦测。因此该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a graph database service specifically designed to support graph queries and the processing of complex relational data. It is ideal for handling scenarios involving graph structures, such as social network analysis or fraud detection. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Neptune 是专门为支持图查询和复杂关系数据处理而设计的图数据库服务。它非常适合处理涉及图结构的场景，例如社交网络分析或欺诈侦测。因此该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a graph database service specifically designed to support graph queries and the processing of complex relational data. It is ideal for handling scenarios involving graph structures, such as social network analysis or fraud detection. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务提供机器学习功能来侦测和分析图像和视频中的内容？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides machine learning capability to detect and analyze content in images and videos?

A.zh: Amazon Connect
A.en: Amazon Connect

B.zh: Amazon Lightsail
B.en: Amazon Lightsail

C.zh: Amazon Personalize
C.en: Amazon Personalize

D.zh: Amazon Rekognition
D.en: Amazon Rekognition

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一项云联系中心服务，用于客户支持和联系中心管理，与图像和视频内容的机器学习分析无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Connect is a cloud contact center service for customer support and call center management, regardless of machine learning analysis of image and video content.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Lightsail 是一种简单的云计算服务，主要用于虚拟服务器、存储和网络功能，与机器学习或图像和视频分析无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Lightsail is a simple cloud computing service that is primarily used for virtual servers, storage, and network functions and has nothing to do with machine learning or image and video analysis.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Personalize 是一项机器学习服务，用于创建独立于图像和视频内容分析的个人化推荐系统。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Personalize is a machine learning service for building personalized recommendation systems, independent of image and video content analysis.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Rekognition 是一项机器学习服务，旨在侦测和分析图像和视频内容，例如人脸识别、对象侦测等。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Rekognition is a machine learning service designed to detect and analyze image and video content, such as facial recognition, object detection, and more.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Rekognition 是一项机器学习服务，旨在侦测和分析图像和视频内容，例如人脸识别、对象侦测等。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Rekognition is a machine learning service designed to detect and analyze image and video content, such as facial recognition, object detection, and more.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望其 AWS 使用能更永续。该公司希望追踪、测量、审查和预测其 AWS 应用程序产生的污染排放。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服务或工具来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants its AWS usage to be more sustainable. The company wants to track, measure, review, and forecast polluting emissions that result from its AWS applications. Which AWS service or tool can the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Health Dashboard
A.en: AWS Health Dashboard

B.zh: AWS 客户碳足迹工具
B.en: AWS customer carbon footprint tool

C.zh: AWS 支持中心
C.en: AWS Support Center

D.zh: Amazon QuickSight
D.en: Amazon QuickSight

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Health Dashboard 主要用于提供有关 AWS 服务运行状态的实时信息，并帮助用户了解服务中断或事件的影响。它与碳排放追踪无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Health Dashboard is mainly used to provide real-time information about the operating status of AWS services and help users understand the impact of service interruptions or events. It has nothing to do with carbon emission tracking.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 客户碳足迹工具旨在协助客户追踪、测量和预测其 AWS 使用过程中的碳排放，是解决此问题的正确工具。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: The AWS customer carbon footprint tool, designed to help customers track, measure, and predict the carbon emissions from their AWS usage, is the right tool to solve this problem.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 支持中心是一个用于管理支持案例和服务请求的支持门户，与碳排放追踪无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Support Center is a support portal for managing support cases and service requests and has nothing to do with carbon emissions tracking.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon QuickSight 是一项用于数据可视化和分析的商业智能服务。虽然它可以用来开发数据，但它不提供碳排放追踪功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon QuickSight is a business intelligence service used for data visualization and analysis. Although it can be used to develop data, it does not provide carbon emission tracking functionality.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS 客户碳足迹工具
answer_text.en: B. AWS customer carbon footprint tool

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 客户碳足迹工具旨在协助客户追踪、测量和预测其 AWS 使用过程中的碳排放，是解决此问题的正确工具。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS customer carbon footprint tool, designed to help customers track, measure, and predict the carbon emissions from their AWS usage, is the right tool to solve this problem.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务使用户能够部署高度可重复的基础设施配置？
question_text.en: Which AWS service gives users the ability to deploy highly repeatable infrastructure configurations?

A.zh: AWS CloudFormation
A.en: AWS CloudFormation

B.zh: AWS CodeDeploy
B.en: AWS CodeDeploy

C.zh: AWS CodeBuild
C.en: AWS CodeBuild

D.zh: AWS Systems Manager
D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CloudFormation 是一项支持基础设施即代码的服务，可让用户通过模板定义和部署可重复的基础设施配置。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CloudFormation is an infrastructure-as-code-enabled service that allows users to define and deploy repeatable infrastructure configurations through templates.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodeDeploy 是一项自动化部署服务，主要用于部署应用代码，而不是管理基础设施配置。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CodeDeploy is an automated deployment service primarily used for the deployment of application code rather than the management of infrastructure configurations.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodeBuild 是一项持续集成服务，用于构建和测试代码，而不是部署基础设施配置。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CodeBuild is a continuous integration service used for building and testing code rather than deploying infrastructure configurations.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Systems Manager 是一项管理和运维服务，为资源提供操作和监控功能，但并不专注于部署可重复的基础设施配置。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Systems Manager is a management and operations service that provides operations and monitoring capabilities for resources, but is not focused on deploying repeatable infrastructure configurations.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CloudFormation 是一项支持基础设施即代码的服务，可让用户通过模板定义和部署可重复的基础设施配置。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS CloudFormation is an infrastructure-as-code-enabled service that allows users to define and deploy repeatable infrastructure configurations through templates.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要使用语音通话和网络聊天功能提供客户服务。公司应该使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to provide customer service by using voice calls and web chat features. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Aurora
A.en: Amazon Aurora

B.zh: Amazon Connect
B.en: Amazon Connect

C.zh: Amazon WorkSpaces
C.en: Amazon WorkSpaces

D.zh: AWS Organizations
D.en: AWS Organizations

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一个关系数据库服务，主要是为了高性能数据库管理而设计的，与客服语音通话和网络聊天功能无关，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a relational database service designed primarily for high-performance database management and is not related to customer service voice calling and web chat capabilities, so this option is.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一项云联系中心服务，专门用于支持语音通话和网络聊天功能，非常适合客户服务场景，所以该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a cloud contact center service specifically designed to support voice calling and web chat capabilities, making it ideal for customer service scenarios, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon WorkSpaces 是一项虚拟桌面服务，提供安全的云桌面环境，并且与客户服务语音通话和网络聊天功能无关，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a virtual inspection service that provides a secure cloud inspection environment and is not associated with customer service voice calling and web chat capabilities, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Organizations 是一项账户管理服务，用于集中管理多个 AWS 账户，与客服的语音通话和网页聊天功能无关，因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an account management service used to centrally manage multiple AWS accounts and has nothing to do with the voice calling and web chat features of customer service, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Connect 是一项云联系中心服务，专门用于支持语音通话和网络聊天功能，非常适合客户服务场景，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a cloud contact center service specifically designed to support voice calling and web chat capabilities, making it ideal for customer service scenarios, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务旨在协助用户在数据仓库环境中处理大量数据？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is designed to help users handle large amounts of data in a data warehouse environment?

A.zh: Amazon RDS
A.en: Amazon RDS

B.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
B.en: Amazon DynamoDB

C.zh: Amazon Redshift
C.en: Amazon Redshift

D.zh: Amazon Aurora
D.en: Amazon Aurora

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon RDS 是一种托管关系数据库服务，适合运行传统关系型数据库（例如MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQL Server等）。它不是专门为处理数据仓库环境中的大规模数据而设计的，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a managed relational database service suitable for running traditional relational databases (such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, etc.). It is not specifically designed to handle large-scale data in a data warehouse environment, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一种 NoSQL 数据库服务，旨在处理高吞吐量和低延迟的键值或文档存储场景。它不适合数据仓库环境，因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a NoSQL database service designed to handle high-throughput and low-latency key-value or document storage scenarios. It is not suitable for a data warehouse environment, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Redshift 是专门为数据仓库设计的服务，能够处理大规模数据分析任务。它支持复杂的查询和分析，非常适合数据仓库环境。因此该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a service designed specifically for data warehousing and capable of handling large-scale data analysis tasks. It supports complex queries and analysis and is ideal for data warehouse environments. Therefore this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一款适用于事务处理和传统数据库应用场景的高性能关系数据库服务。它不是专门为在数据仓库环境中使用而设计的，因此此选项是专为在数据仓库环境中使用而设计的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a high-performance relational database service suitable for transaction processing and traditional database application scenarios. It is not specifically designed for use in a data warehouse environment, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Redshift 是专门为数据仓库设计的服务，能够处理大规模数据分析任务。它支持复杂的查询和分析，非常适合数据仓库环境。因此该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service designed specifically for data warehousing and capable of handling large-scale data analysis tasks. It supports complex queries and analysis and is ideal for data warehouse environments. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS 创建 Web 应用程序。哪种 AWS 服务将有助于防止针对 Web 应用程序的网络层 DDoS 攻击？
question_text.en: A company is building a web application using AWS. Which AWS service will help prevent network layer DDoS attacks against the web application?

A.zh: AWS WAF
A.en: AWS WAF

B.zh: AWS Firewall Manager
B.en: AWS Firewall Manager

C.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: AWS Shield
D.en: AWS Shield

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：（网页应用防火墙）主要用于保护应用程序免受常见的Web攻击（例如SQL注入和跨站脚本攻击），而不是专门针对网络层DDoS攻击。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: (Web Application Firewall) is mainly used to protect applications from common web attacks (such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks), rather than specifically targeting network layer DDoS attacks. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Firewall Manager 是一个集中管理工具，用于管理跨多个账户的防火墙规则和策略。它本身并不直接防御 DDoS 攻击，而是帮助管理其他安全服务（例如 AWS WAF 和 AWS Shield）。因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a centralized management tool for managing firewall rules and policies across multiple accounts. It does not directly defend against DDoS attacks itself, but helps manage other security services (such as AWS WAF and AWS Shield). Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一种威胁检测服务，用于识别潜在的恶意活动和异常行为，但它不能直接防范网络层 DDoS 攻击。因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a threat detection service used to identify potentially malicious activities and anomalous behaviors, but it does not directly protect against network layer DDoS attacks. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Shield 是专门为防御DDoS攻击而设计的服务，分为标准版和高级版。可以有效防御网络层和应用层的DDoS攻击。因此该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a service specially designed to defend against DDoS attacks and is divided into standard and premium editions. It can effectively defend against DDoS attacks at the network layer and application layer. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Shield 是专门为防御DDoS攻击而设计的服务，分为标准版和高级版。可以有效防御网络层和应用层的DDoS攻击。因此该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service specially designed to defend against DDoS attacks and is divided into standard and premium editions. It can effectively defend against DDoS attacks at the network layer and application layer. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 迁移到 AWS 云有下列哪些优点？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are advantages of moving to the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 用户可以在几秒钟内实施所有 AWS 服务。
A.en: Users can implement all AWS services in seconds.

B.zh: AWS 承担基础设施和应用程序安全的所有责任。
B.en: AWS assumes all responsibility for the security of infrastructure and applications.

C.zh: 用户体验到更快的速度和敏捷性。
C.en: Users experience increased speed and agility.

D.zh: 用户受益于大规模的规模经济。
D.en: Users benefit from massive economies of scale.

E.zh: 用户可以将硬件从数据中心移动到 AWS 云。
E.en: Users can move hardware from their data center to the AWS Cloud.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AWS提供了快速部署服务的能力，但并非所有服务都可以在几秒钟内实施。例如，一些复杂的服务需要配置和部署时间。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While AWS provides the ability to deploy services quickly, not all services can be implemented in seconds. For example, some complex services require configuration and time to deploy.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS采用责任共担模式，其中AWS 负责基础设施的安全，而用户负责应用程序和数据的安全。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS adopts a shared responsibility model, where AWS is responsible for the security of the infrastructure, while users are responsible for the security of applications and data.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：通过迁移到 AWS，用户可以快速配置资源并缩短实验和部署周期，从而提高速度和敏捷性。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: By migrating to AWS, users can quickly provision resources and shorten experimentation and deployment cycles, improving speed and agility.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS通过大规模运维降低成本，用户可以享受经济效益。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations, and users can enjoy economic benefits.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS云是基于虚拟化的服务，用户无法直接将物理硬件迁移到云。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS cloud is a virtualization-based service, and users cannot directly migrate physical hardware to the cloud.

answer_text.zh: C. 用户体验到更快的速度和敏捷性。；D. 用户受益于大规模的规模经济。
answer_text.en: C. Users experience increased speed and agility.; D. Users benefit from massive economies of scale.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：CD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：通过迁移到 AWS，用户可以快速配置资源并缩短实验和部署周期，从而提高速度和敏捷性。；AWS通过大规模运维降低成本，用户可以享受经济效益。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: By migrating to AWS, users can quickly provision resources and shorten experimentation and deployment cycles, improving speed and agility.; AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations, and users can enjoy economic benefits.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 计算服务使用户能够安全可靠地大规模运行容器？
question_text.en: Which AWS compute service gives users the ability to securely and reliably run containers at scale?

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
A.en: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)

B.zh: Amazon Aurora
B.en: Amazon Aurora

C.zh: Amazon Athena
C.en: Amazon Athena

D.zh: Amazon Polly
D.en: Amazon Polly

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon ECS 是 AWS 提供的容器编排服务，旨在安全可靠地运行容器化应用程序，并支持大规模运行容器。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service provided by AWS that is designed to run containerized applications securely and reliably, and supports running containers at scale.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一种关系数据库服务，与运行容器无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Aurora is a relational database service that has nothing to do with running containers.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Athena 是一项交互式查询服务，用于分析 Amazon S3 中存储的数据，与容器运行无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Athena is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3, independent of container runs.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Polly 是一种与容器无关的文本转语音服务。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Polly is a text-to-speech service that is container-agnostic.

answer_text.zh: A. Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
answer_text.en: A. Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon ECS 是 AWS 提供的容器编排服务，旨在安全可靠地运行容器化应用程序，并支持大规模运行容器。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service provided by AWS that is designed to run containerized applications securely and reliably, and supports running containers at scale.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 工具或功能可作为子网层级的 VPC 防火墙？
question_text.en: Which AWS tool or feature acts as a VPC firewall at the subnet level?

A.zh: 安全群组
A.en: Security group

B.zh: 网络 ACL
B.en: Network ACL

C.zh: 流量镜像
C.en: Traffic Mirroring

D.zh: 互联网网关
D.en: Internet gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全群组是控制进出 EC2 实例的流量的实例级防火墙，而不是子网层级防火墙。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Security groups are instance-level firewalls that control traffic to and from EC2 instances, rather than subnet-level firewalls.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：网络 ACL（网络访问控制清单）是子网层级防火墙，用于控制进出子网的流量。它可以设置允许和拒绝规则并且是无状态的。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: A Network ACL (Network Access Control List) is a subnet-level firewall that controls traffic in and out of a subnet. It can set allow and deny rules and is stateless.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：流量镜像是一种用于截取和分析网络流量的工具，而不是防火墙功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Traffic Mirroring is a tool used to capture and analyze network traffic, not a firewall feature.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Internet 网关是允许 VPC 与 Internet 通信的组件，不具防火墙功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: An Internet gateway is a component that allows a VPC to communicate with the Internet and does not have firewall functionality.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：网络 ACL（网络访问控制清单）是子网层级防火墙，用于控制进出子网的流量。它可以设置允许和拒绝规则并且是无状态的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: A Network ACL (Network Access Control List) is a subnet-level firewall that controls traffic in and out of a subnet. It can set allow and deny rules and is stateless.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上运行一个运行批量作业的应用程序。该应用程序是容错的并且可以处理中断。该公司希望优化运行该应用程序的成本。哪种 AWS 产品可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an application on AWS that performs batch jobs. The application is fault-tolerant and can handle interruptions. The company wants to optimize the cost to run the application. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Macie
A.en: Amazon Macie

B.zh: Amazon Neptune
B.en: Amazon Neptune

C.zh: Amazon EC2 竞价型实例
C.en: Amazon EC2 Spot Instances

D.zh: Amazon EC2 按需型实例
D.en: Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Macie 是一种数据安全服务，用于识别和保护敏感数据。它与运行批量作业的应用程序无关，因此Amazon Macie 是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a data security service used to identify and protect sensitive data. It has nothing to do with the application running the batch job, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Neptune 是一种用于创建图形数据模型的托管图形数据库服务。它与运行批量作业的应用程序无关，因此Amazon Neptune 是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a managed graph database service for building graph data models. It has nothing to do with the application running the batch job, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：竞价型实例是 EC2 的定价模型，允许用户以较低的价格使用未使用的计算能力。非常适合容错且能够处理中断的应用程序，例如批量作业。这个选项是正确的，因为它既满足成本优化需求，也满足容错应用。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Spot Instances is a pricing model of EC2 that allows users to use unused computing capacity at a lower price. Ideal for applications that are fault tolerant and able to handle interruptions, such as batch jobs. This option is correct because it meets both cost optimization needs and fault-tolerant applications.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：按需型实例是 EC2 的一种定价模型，即用即付，无需长期承诺。虽然它适合运行应用程序，但价格较高，并不是成本优化的最佳选择。该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: On-Demand Instances is a pricing model of EC2 that pays as you go without long-term commitment. Although it is suitable for running applications, it is more expensive and is not the best choice for cost optimization. This option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: C. Amazon EC2 竞价型实例

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：竞价型实例是 EC2 的定价模型，允许用户以较低的价格使用未使用的计算能力。非常适合容错且能够处理中断的应用程序，例如批量作业。这个选项是正确的，因为它既满足成本优化需求，也满足容错应用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Spot Instances is a pricing model of EC2 that allows users to use unused computing capacity at a lower price. Ideal for applications that are fault tolerant and able to handle interruptions, such as batch jobs. This option is correct because it meets both cost optimization needs and fault-tolerant applications.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪个 AWS 服务可用于在调用特定 Amazon CloudWatch 警报时发送警报？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can be used to send alerts when a specific Amazon CloudWatch alarm is invoked?

A.zh: AWS CloudTrail
A.en: AWS CloudTrail

B.zh: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
B.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

C.zh: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
C.en: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)

D.zh: Amazon EventBridge
D.en: Amazon EventBridge

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CloudTrail 主要用于记录API调用和用户活动。它无法直接发送通知或警报，因此此选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is mainly used to record API calls and user activity. It cannot send notifications or alerts directly, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon SNS 是一种通知发送服务，可以通过电子邮件、短信等方式发送通知。它与 Amazon CloudWatch 集成良好，可以在触发 CloudWatch 警报时发送通知。因此该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon SNS is a notification delivery service that can send notifications via email, SMS, etc. It integrates well with Amazon CloudWatch and can send notifications when CloudWatch alarms are triggered. Therefore this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon SQS 是一种消息队列服务，主要用于消息的解耦和异步处理。虽然可以接收由 CloudWatch 警报触发的通知，但它不直接用于发送通知，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SQS is a message queue service, mainly used for decoupling and asynchronous processing of messages. While it is possible to receive notifications triggered by CloudWatch alarms, it is not used directly to send notifications, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EventBridge 是一种事件路由服务，用于捕获事件并将其路由到目标服务。虽然它可以处理CloudWatch警报事件，但它不是专门设计用来发送通知的服务，因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an event routing service that captures and routes events to target services. Although it can handle CloudWatch alarm events, it is not a service specifically designed to send notifications, so this option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: B. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
answer_text.en: B. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon SNS 是一种通知发送服务，可以通过电子邮件、短信等方式发送通知。它与 Amazon CloudWatch 集成良好，可以在触发 CloudWatch 警报时发送通知。因此该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon SNS is a notification delivery service that can send notifications via email, SMS, etc. It integrates well with Amazon CloudWatch and can send notifications when CloudWatch alarms are triggered. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 云从业者希望为其 AWS 工作负载使用高度可用且可扩展的 DNS 服务。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A cloud practitioner wants to use a highly available and scalable DNS service for its AWS workload. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: Amazon Route 53
A.en: Amazon Route 53

B.zh: Amazon Lightsail
B.en: Amazon Lightsail

C.zh: AWS Amplify 托管
C.en: AWS Amplify Hosting

D.zh: Amazon S3
D.en: Amazon S3

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Route 53 是 AWS 提供的一项高度可用且可扩展的 DNS 服务，专门用于管理网域名称解析并将流量路由到不同的资源。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is a highly available and scalable DNS service provided by AWS, specifically designed to manage domain name resolution and route traffic to different resources.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Lightsail 是一种简化的云计算服务，主要用于托管简单的应用程序和网站，但它不是专用的 DNS 服务。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Lightsail is a simplified cloud computing service primarily used for hosting simple applications and websites, but it is not a dedicated DNS service.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Amplify Hosting 是一项针对前端和全栈应用程序的托管服务，主要用于部署和托管 Web 应用程序而不是 DNS 服务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Amplify Hosting is a hosting service for front-end and full-stack applications designed primarily for deploying and hosting web applications rather than DNS services.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 是用于存储和检索数据的对象存储服务，但它与 DNS 服务无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is an object storage service used to store and retrieve data, but it has nothing to do with the DNS service.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Route 53 是 AWS 提供的一项高度可用且可扩展的 DNS 服务，专门用于管理网域名称解析并将流量路由到不同的资源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is a highly available and scalable DNS service provided by AWS, specifically designed to manage domain name resolution and route traffic to different resources.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根据AWS责任共担模式，哪一项任务是客户的责任？
question_text.en: According to the AWS shared responsibility model, which task is the customer's responsibility?

A.zh: 维护运行 AWS Lambda 所需的基础设施
A.en: Maintaining the infrastructure needed to run AWS Lambda

B.zh: 更新 Amazon DynamoDB 实例的操作系统
B.en: Updating the operating system of Amazon DynamoDB instances

C.zh: 维护 Amazon S3 基础设施
C.en: Maintaining Amazon S3 infrastructure

D.zh: 更新 Amazon EC2 实例上的来宾操作系统
D.en: Updating the guest operating system on Amazon EC2 instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是一项完全托管的服务，AWS 负责维护运行 Lambda 所需的基础设施。客户只需关闭代码和配置即可。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Lambda is a fully managed service, and AWS is responsible for maintaining the infrastructure required to run Lambda. Customers only need to close the code and configuration.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一项完全托管的服务，由 AWS 管理和更新其底层操作系统。无需客户介入。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed service, with AWS managing and updating its underlying operating system. No customer intervention is required.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 是一项完全托管的存储服务，AWS 维护其基础设施。客户只需管理存储的内容和权限。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is a fully managed storage service, and AWS maintains its infrastructure. Customers only need to manage stored content and permissions.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：在共担责任模型下，客户负责管理 EC2 实例的操作系统，包括更新和安全性修补程序。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Under the shared responsibility model, customers are responsible for managing the EC2 instance's operating system, including updates and security patches.

answer_text.zh: D. 更新 Amazon EC2 实例上的来宾操作系统
answer_text.en: D. Updating the guest operating system on Amazon EC2 instances

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：在共担责任模型下，客户负责管理 EC2 实例的操作系统，包括更新和安全性修补程序。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Under the shared responsibility model, customers are responsible for managing the EC2 instance's operating system, including updates and security patches.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在了解其与 Amazon EC2 实例管理相关的职责。根据 AWS 责任共担模式，EC2 实例的哪些任务是公司的责任？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company is learning about its responsibilities that are related to the management of Amazon EC2 instances. Which tasks for EC2 instances are the company’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 安装并修补机器管理程序。
A.en: Install and patch the machine hypervisor.

B.zh: 修补来宾操作系统。
B.en: Patch the guest operating system.

C.zh: 加密关联存储上的静态数据。
C.en: Encrypt data at rest on associated storage.

D.zh: 安装物理硬件和布线。
D.en: Install the physical hardware and cabling.

E.zh: 为 EC2 实例提供物理安全。
E.en: Provide physical security for the EC2 instances.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：根据 AWS 责任共担模式，AWS 负责安装和修补底层虚拟机管理程序，客户不负责该任务。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: According to the AWS shared responsibility model, AWS is responsible for managing the underlying infrastructure, including the installation and patching of the hypervisor. The customer is not responsible for cup tasks.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：客户负责管理和维护其 EC2 实例上的操作系统，包括安装修补程序和更新。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Customers are responsible for managing and maintaining the operating system on their EC2 instances, including installing patches and updates.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：客户有责任保护其数据，包括加密静态数据。这是责任共担模式中客户角色的一部分。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Customers are responsible for protecting their data, including encrypting data at rest. This is part of the client's role in the shared responsibility model.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 管理和维护数据中心的硬件和布线，因此客户无需负责。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS manages and maintains the data center's hardware and cabling, so customers don't need to be responsible.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 负责数据中心的管理安全，包括访问控制、监控等措施，客户无需负责这些任务。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS is responsible for the management security of the data center, including access control, monitoring and other measures, and customers do not need to be responsible for these tasks.

answer_text.zh: B. 修补来宾操作系统。；C. 加密关联存储上的静态数据。
answer_text.en: B. Patch the guest operating system.; C. Encrypt data at rest on associated storage.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：客户负责管理和维护其 EC2 实例上的操作系统，包括安装修补程序和更新。；客户有责任保护其数据，包括加密静态数据。这是责任共担模式中客户角色的一部分。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Customers are responsible for managing and maintaining the operating system on their EC2 instances, including installing patches and updates.; Customers are responsible for protecting their data, including encrypting data at rest. This is part of the client's role in the shared responsibility model.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地数据中心的自我管理服务器上运行 MySQL 数据库工作负载。该公司希望将数据库工作负载迁移到 AWS 托管服务。公司应该使用哪种迁移策略？
question_text.en: A company runs MySQL database workloads on self-managed servers in an on-premises data center. The company wants to migrate the database workloads to an AWS managed service. Which migration strategy should the company use?

A.zh: 重新主持
A.en: Rehost

B.zh: 回购
B.en: Repurchase

C.zh: 重构
C.en: Refactor

D.zh: 平台重构
D.en: Replatform

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：重新主持 是一种「替代迁移」的方法，通常涉及将现有工作负载从本地迁移到云，而不对应用程序进行任何修改。对于数据库工作负载，Rehost 可能涉及将数据库迁移到 EC2 实例，但这不是「完全托管服务」，因此不符合问题要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a method of "replacement migration", which usually involves migrating existing workloads from local to the cloud without any modification to the application program. For database workloads, Rehost may involve migrating the database to an EC2 instance, but this is not a "fully managed service" and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：回购 是指购买新软件或服务来取代现有解决方案，例如从自托管数据库迁移到第三方 SaaS 解决方案。问题没有提到需要购买新软件，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the purchase of new software or services to replace an existing solution, such as migrating from a self-hosted database to a third-party SaaS solution. The question does not mention the need to purchase new software, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：重构 是对应用程序的重大修改，以利用云的本地功能。虽然重构可以优化数据库性能，但题目中并没有提到需要重构数据库，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a significant modification to an application to take advantage of the native capabilities of the cloud. Although reconstruction can optimize database performance, the question does not mention the need to reconstruct the database, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：平台重构 是指对应用程序进行轻微修改以转移到云托管服务。将 MySQL 数据库迁移到 AWS 托管服务（例如 Amazon RDS for MySQL）是典型的 Replatform 策略，因此此选项也是如此。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: refers to the slight modification of the application program to move to a cloud hosting service. Migrating a MySQL database to an AWS managed service such as Amazon RDS for MySQL is a typical Replatform strategy, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (80%) B (20%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：平台重构 是指对应用程序进行轻微修改以转移到云托管服务。将 MySQL 数据库迁移到 AWS 托管服务（例如 Amazon RDS for MySQL）是典型的 Replatform 策略，因此此选项也是如此。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (80%) B (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: refers to the slight modification of the application program to move to a cloud hosting service. Migrating a MySQL database to an AWS managed service such as Amazon RDS for MySQL is a typical Replatform strategy, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正计划将单体应用程序迁移到 AWS。该公司希望通过将应用程序拆分为微服务来实现应用程序的现代化。该公司将在 AWS 上部署微服务。公司应该使用哪种迁移策略？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate a monolithic application to AWS. The company wants to modernize the application by splitting it into microservices. The company will deploy the microservices on AWS. Which migration strategy should the company use?

A.zh: 重新主持
A.en: Rehost

B.zh: 回购
B.en: Repurchase

C.zh: 平台重构
C.en: Replatform

D.zh: 重构
D.en: Refactor

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：重新主持 是「原样迁移」，即现有应用程序直接迁移到云，无需对应用程序进行任何修改。这种方式适合快速迁移，但不适合需要现代化的场景。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is "migration as is", that is, existing applications are directly migrated to the cloud without any modification to the application. This approach is suitable for quick migrations, but is not suitable for scenarios that require modernization. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：回购 是指购买新的 SaaS 解决方案来取代现有应用程序。这种方法通常用于替换现有应用程序，而不是对其进行现代化改造。因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the purchase of a new SaaS solution to replace an existing application. This approach is typically used to replace existing applications rather than modernize them. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：平台重构 是指对应用程序进行轻微修改以适应云环境，但不对应用程序架构进行较大更改。虽然它比Rehost更灵活，但它不适合单一应用程序分割为微服务的场景。因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to making slight modifications to the application to adapt to the cloud environment, but does not make major changes to the application architecture. Although it is more flexible than Rehost, it is not suitable for scenarios where a single application is split into microservices. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：指的是应用程序的重大架构转变，例如将单一应用程序拆分为微服务。这种方法最适合问题中所说的「现代化」和「微服务部署」需求。因此该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: refers to a major architectural transformation of an application, such as splitting a single application into microservices. This method is most suitable for the "modernization" and "microservice deployment" requirements stated in the question. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：指的是应用程序的重大架构转变，例如将单一应用程序拆分为微服务。这种方法最适合问题中所说的「现代化」和「微服务部署」需求。因此该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: refers to a major architectural transformation of an application, such as splitting a single application into microservices. This method is most suitable for the "modernization" and "microservice deployment" requirements stated in the question. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望按部门和项目对其云成本进行详细追踪。公司应该使用哪些 AWS 功能或服务？
question_text.en: A company wants to implement detailed tracking of its cloud costs by department and project. Which AWS feature or service should the company use?

A.zh: 合并账单
A.en: Consolidated billing

B.zh: 成本分配标签
B.en: Cost allocation tags

C.zh: AWS Marketplace
C.en: AWS Marketplace

D.zh: AWS Budgets
D.en: AWS Budgets

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：合并计费用于将多个账户的账单合并到一个账户中，方便集中管理，但不提供详细的费用追踪功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Consolidated billing is used to consolidate bills from multiple accounts into one account to facilitate centralized management, but it does not provide detailed cost tracking functionality.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：成本分配标签是 AWS 提供的一项功能，可通过为资源分配标签来实现详细的成本追踪。可依部门、项目等维度进行标签分类，以实现成本精准分配。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Cost allocation tags is a feature provided by AWS that enables detailed cost tracking by assigning tags to resources. Tags can be classified by departments, projects and other dimensions to achieve precise cost allocation.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Marketplace 是一个用于购买第三方软件和服务的在线商店，与成本追踪无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Marketplace is an online store for purchasing third-party software and services that has nothing to do with cost tracking.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Budgets 用于设置预算和监控成本，但它不支持详细的成本分配和追踪。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Budgets is used for setting budgets and monitoring costs, but it does not enable detailed cost allocation and tracking.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：成本分配标签是 AWS 提供的一项功能，可通过为资源分配标签来实现详细的成本追踪。可依部门、项目等维度进行标签分类，以实现成本精准分配。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Cost allocation tags is a feature provided by AWS that enables detailed cost tracking by assigning tags to resources. Tags can be classified by departments, projects and other dimensions to achieve precise cost allocation.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 当 Amazon EC2 实例进入「停止」状态时，用户想要调用 AWS Lambda 函数。哪种 AWS 服务适合此用例？
question_text.en: A user wants to invoke an AWS Lambda function when an Amazon EC2 instance enters the “stopping” state. Which AWS service is appropriate for this use case?

A.zh: Amazon EventBridge
A.en: Amazon EventBridge

B.zh: AWS Config
B.en: AWS Config

C.zh: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
C.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

D.zh: AWS CloudFormation
D.en: AWS CloudFormation

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon EventBridge 是一项事件总线服务，可截取 AWS 资源的状态变更事件（例如 EC2 实例进入「停止」状态）并触发后续操作（例如调用 Lambda 函数）。因此符合题目要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon EventBridge is an event bus service that can capture status change events of AWS resources (such as an EC2 instance entering the "stopping" state) and trigger subsequent operations (such as calling a Lambda function). This is the correct answer to this question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Config 主要用于记录资源配置的历史变更和合规性检查，而不是实时响应资源状态变更事件。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Config is mainly used to record historical changes in resource configurations and compliance checks, rather than responding to resource status change events in real time.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：SNS 是一种消息通知服务，可以向订阅者发送消息，但无法直接截取 EC2 实例状态变更事件。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SNS is a message notification service that can send messages to subscribers, but it cannot directly capture EC2 instance status change events.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：CloudFormation 是一项基础设施即代码服务，用于创建和管理 AWS 资源，但不用于监控资源状态变更或触发事件。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudFormation is an infrastructure-as-code service that is used to create and manage AWS resources, but it is not used to monitor resource status changes or trigger events.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon EventBridge 是一项事件总线服务，可截取 AWS 资源的状态变更事件（例如 EC2 实例进入「停止」状态）并触发后续操作（例如调用 Lambda 函数）。因此符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon EventBridge is an event bus service that can capture status change events of AWS resources (such as an EC2 instance entering the "stopping" state) and trigger subsequent operations (such as calling a Lambda function). This is the correct answer to this question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司内部有一个 MariaDB 数据库。该公司希望将数据移至 AWS 云。哪项 AWS 服务将以最少的运维开销托管此数据库？
question_text.en: A company has a MariaDB database on premises. The company wants to move the data to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service will host this database with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?

A.zh: Amazon RDS
A.en: Amazon RDS

B.zh: Amazon Neptune
B.en: Amazon Neptune

C.zh: Amazon S3
C.en: Amazon S3

D.zh: Amazon DynamoDB
D.en: Amazon DynamoDB

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon RDS 是由 MariaDB 提供支持的托管数据库服务，可大幅减少数据库管理和运维开销。用户无需管理底层硬件、操作系统或数据库软件，AWS会自动处理备份、修补和监控。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS is a managed database service powered by MariaDB that significantly reduces database management and operational overhead. Users do not need to manage the underlying hardware, operating system or database software, AWS automatically handles backup, patching and monitoring.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Neptune 是专门针对图形数据库的服务，不适用于 MariaDB 等托管关系数据库。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Neptune is a service specifically for graph databases and is not intended for hosted relational databases such as MariaDB.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 是一种对象存储服务，适合存储文件和数据对象，但不适合托管关系数据库。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is an object storage service that is suitable for storing files and data objects, but is not suitable for hosting relational databases.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 是一种 NoSQL 数据库服务，适用于键值对和文档存储，不支持关系数据库（例如 MariaDB）。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon DynamoDB is a NoSQL database service, suitable for key-value pairs and document storage, and does not support relational databases (such as MariaDB).

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon RDS 是由 MariaDB 提供支持的托管数据库服务，可大幅减少数据库管理和运维开销。用户无需管理底层硬件、操作系统或数据库软件，AWS会自动处理备份、修补和监控。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS is a managed database service powered by MariaDB that significantly reduces database management and operational overhead. Users do not need to manage the underlying hardware, operating system or database software, AWS automatically handles backup, patching and monitoring.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服务或功能支持 AWS 账户的治理、合规性和风险稽核？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature supports governance, compliance, and risk auditing of AWS accounts?

A.zh: 多重身份验证 (MFA)
A.en: Multi-factor authentication (MFA)

B.zh: AWS Lambda
B.en: AWS Lambda

C.zh: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
C.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

D.zh: AWS CloudTrail
D.en: AWS CloudTrail

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：MFA 是一项安全功能，用于增强用户账户的保护，但它与治理、合规性和风险审计没有直接关系，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: MFA is a security feature used to enhance the protection of user accounts, but it is not directly related to governance, compliance and risk auditing, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是一种用于运行代码的无服务器计算服务，但它不涉及治理、合规性或风险审计功能，因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a serverless computing service used to run code, but it does not involve governance, compliance, or risk auditing capabilities, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon SNS 是用于发送通知的消息服务，但它不支持治理、合规性或风险审核功能，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SNS is a messaging service used to send notifications, but it does not support governance, compliance, or risk auditing capabilities, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CloudTrail 是一项记录和追踪用户活动和 API 调用的服务，支持治理、合规性和风险审计，因此符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a service that records and tracks user activity and API calls, supporting governance, compliance, and risk auditing, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CloudTrail 是一项记录和追踪用户活动和 API 调用的服务，支持治理、合规性和风险审计，因此符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service that records and tracks user activity and API calls, supporting governance, compliance, and risk auditing, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 公司实施 AWS CloudTrail 时使用哪一种 AWS 云设计原则？
question_text.en: Which AWS Cloud design principle is a company using when the company implements AWS CloudTrail?

A.zh: 启动可追溯性。
A.en: Activate traceability.

B.zh: 使用无服务器计算架构。
B.en: Use serverless compute architectures.

C.zh: 依照程序​​码运行操作。
C.en: Perform operations as code.

D.zh: 只需几分钟即可走向全球。
D.en: Go global in minutes.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CloudTrail的主要功能是记录用户和服务作业日志并提供审计和追溯功能。这完全符合「启动可追溯性」的设计原则。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The main function of AWS CloudTrail is to record user and service operation logs and provide auditing and traceability functions. This aligns perfectly with the “Activate Traceability” design principle.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Serverless计算架构（例如AWS Lambda）是关于如何设计应用程序的计算资源，而CloudTrail 是一种日志服务，与Serverless架构没有直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Serverless computing architecture (such as AWS Lambda) is about how to design the computing resources of the application, while CloudTrail is a logging service and not directly related to serverless architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：「将操作作为代码运行」是指使用代码来自动化操作和管理资源（例如通过AWS CloudFormation），而CloudTrail用于记录操作日志，不涉及代码运行。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: "Execute operations as code" refers to using code to automate operations and manage resources (such as through AWS CloudFormation), while CloudTrail is used to record operation logs and does not involve code execution.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：「分钟全球化」是指AWS的全球基础设施支持快速扩展到多个区域，而CloudTrail的功能与全球化没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: "Globalization in minutes" means that AWS's global infrastructure supports rapid expansion to multiple regions, while CloudTrail's functions are not directly related to globalization.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CloudTrail的主要功能是记录用户和服务作业日志并提供审计和追溯功能。这完全符合「启动可追溯性」的设计原则。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The main function of AWS CloudTrail is to record user and service operation logs and provide auditing and traceability functions. This aligns perfectly with the “Activate Traceability” design principle.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 本公司需要威胁侦测服务来持续监控其 AWS 账户、工作负载和 Amazon S3 存储桶是否有恶意活动和未经授权的行为。哪种 AWS 服务符合这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs a threat detection service that will continuously monitor its AWS accounts, workloads, and Amazon S3 buckets for malicious activity and unauthorized behavior. Which AWS service meets these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Shield
A.en: AWS Shield

B.zh: AWS Firewall Manager
B.en: AWS Firewall Manager

C.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: Amazon Inspector
D.en: Amazon Inspector

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield 是一项旨在保护应用程序免受分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) 攻击的服务。它不会为 AWS 账户、工作负载或 S3 存储桶提供全面的威胁检测，因此此选项可以。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service designed to protect applications from distributed denial of service (DDoS) attacks. It does not provide comprehensive threat detection for AWS accounts, workloads, or S3 buckets, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Firewall Manager 是集中管理防火墙规则的服务，主要用于管理和部署规则以保护资源。它没有持续监控威胁的能力，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service that centrally manages firewall rules and is mainly used to manage and deploy rules to protect resources. It does not have the capability to continuously monitor threats, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一项威胁检测服务，可永续监控 AWS 账户、工作负载和 S3 存储桶，以侦测恶意活动和未经授权的行为。该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a threat detection service that continuously monitors AWS accounts, workloads, and S3 buckets to detect malicious activity and unauthorized behavior. This option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Inspector 是一项自动化安全评估服务，主要用于检查应用程序安全漏洞和合规问题。它不适合持续性威胁检测，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an automated security assessment service mainly used to check application security vulnerabilities and compliance issues. It is not suitable for persistent threat detection, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon GuardDuty 是一项威胁检测服务，可永续监控 AWS 账户、工作负载和 S3 存储桶，以侦测恶意活动和未经授权的行为。该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a threat detection service that continuously monitors AWS accounts, workloads, and S3 buckets to detect malicious activity and unauthorized behavior. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正计划迁移到 AWS 云。该公司正在进行组织转型，希望能够更积极地响应客户的询问和反馈。根据 AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)，公司应该运行哪些任务来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company is conducting organizational transformation and wants to become more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback. Which task should the company perform to meet these requirements, according to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)?

A.zh: 重新调整团队以专注于产品和价值流。
A.en: Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.

B.zh: 通过新产品和服务创造新的价值主张。
B.en: Create new value propositions with new products and services.

C.zh: 使用新的数据和分析平台来创建可行的见解。
C.en: Use a new data and analytics platform to create actionable insights.

D.zh: 迁移遗留基础设施并使其现代化。
D.en: Migrate and modernize legacy infrastructure.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：根据AWS CAF的说法，组织转型的核心是通过团队重组，聚焦产品和价值流，提高响应客户需求的能力。这直接符合「更积极响应客户的询问和反馈」的要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: According to AWS CAF, the core of organizational transformation is to improve the ability to respond to customer needs through the realignment of teams to focus on products and value streams. This directly aligns with the requirement in the question of “becoming more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback.”.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然创造新的价值主张可以帮助公司吸引客户，但这并不是提高响应客户询问和反馈的能力的直接任务。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While creating new value propositions can help companies attract customers, it is not a direct task of improving the ability to respond to customer inquiries and feedback.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：数据和分析平台的使用可以帮助企业获得洞察，但这与组织转型和团队调整无关，直接解决问题的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The use of data and analytics platforms can help companies gain insights, but this has nothing to do with organizational transformation and team adjustment, and directly solves the needs of the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：迁移和现代化遗留基础设施是一项技术领域任务，与组织转型和提高客户响应能力没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Migrating and modernizing legacy infrastructure is a technology domain task that is not directly related to organizational transformation and improving customer responsiveness.

answer_text.zh: A. 重新调整团队以专注于产品和价值流。
answer_text.en: A. Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：根据AWS CAF的说法，组织转型的核心是通过团队重组，聚焦产品和价值流，提高响应客户需求的能力。这直接符合「更积极响应客户的询问和反馈」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: According to AWS CAF, the core of organizational transformation is to improve the ability to respond to customer needs through the realignment of teams to focus on products and value streams. This directly aligns with the requirement in the question of “becoming more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback.”.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要调整其 Amazon EC2 实例的规模。哪种配置变更能够以最少的运维开销满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to rightsize its Amazon EC2 instances. Which configuration change will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在另一个可用区中添加 EC2 实例。
A.en: Add EC2 instances in another Availability Zone.

B.zh: 根据使用率变更 EC2 实例的大小和类型。
B.en: Change the size and type of the EC2 instances based on utilization.

C.zh: 将付款方式从按需付款方式转换为节省计划。
C.en: Convert the payment method from On-Demand to Savings Plans.

D.zh: 使用更大的实例类型重新配置 EC2 实例。
D.en: Reprovision the EC2 instances with a larger instance type.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在另一个可用区中添加实例并不能解决「调整大小」问题。 Rightsize的目标是优化现有资源，而不是增加资源。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Adding instances in another Availability Zone does not resolve the "rightsizing" issue. The goal of Rightsize is to optimize existing resources, not to increase resources.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：根据使用情况调整实例大小和变更实例类型是调整大小的核心面向。这种方法可确保资源满足实际需求，同时减少运维开销。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Resizing and changing instance types based on usage is a core aspect of rightsizing. This approach ensures that resources match actual needs while reducing operational overhead.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：规模是关于资源优化，而不是成本优化。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: size is about resource optimization, not cost optimization.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：直接使用较大的实例类型可能会导致资源过度分配，这与调整规模的目标背道而驰。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using a larger instance type directly may lead to over-allocation of resources, contrary to the goals of rightsizing.

answer_text.zh: B. 根据使用率变更 EC2 实例的大小和类型。
answer_text.en: B. Change the size and type of the EC2 instances based on utilization.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：根据使用情况调整实例大小和变更实例类型是调整大小的核心面向。这种方法可确保资源满足实际需求，同时减少运维开销。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Resizing and changing instance types based on usage is a core aspect of rightsizing. This approach ensures that resources match actual needs while reducing operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务支持用户注册功能以及对行动和 Web 应用程序的验证？
question_text.en: Which AWS service supports user sign-up functionality and authentication to mobile and web applications?

A.zh: Amazon Cognito
A.en: Amazon Cognito

B.zh: AWS Config
B.en: AWS Config

C.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: AWS Systems Manager
D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Cognito 是一项专门为支持行动和 Web 应用程序的用户注册、登录和身份验证而设计的服务。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Cognito is a service specifically designed to support user registration, login, and authentication for mobile and web applications.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Config 是一项用于资源配置管理和合规性检查的服务，与用户验证无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Config is a service for resource configuration management and compliance checking, independent of user authentication.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一种威胁检测服务，用于保护 AWS 账户和工作负载，与用户注册和验证无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to secure AWS accounts and workloads regardless of user registration and authentication.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Systems Manager 是一项用于管理和操作 AWS 资源的服务，与用户验证无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Systems Manager is a service for managing and operating AWS resources, independent of user authentication.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Cognito 是一项专门为支持行动和 Web 应用程序的用户注册、登录和身份验证而设计的服务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Cognito is a service specifically designed to support user registration, login, and authentication for mobile and web applications.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 由于所有 AWS 用户的聚合使用量，AWS 云的哪些优点可以帮助公司降低使用成本？
question_text.en: Which benefit of the AWS Cloud helps companies achieve lower usage costs because of the aggregate usage of all AWS users?

A.zh: 无须猜测容量
A.en: No need to guess capacity

B.zh: 能够在几分钟内走向全球
B.en: Ability to go global in minutes

C.zh: 规模经济
C.en: Economies of scale

D.zh: 提高速度与敏捷性
D.en: Increased speed and agility

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项描述了AWS的弹性，这意味着用户不需要估计容量，可以根据实际需要动态调整资源。这与降低使用成本没有直接关系。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The cup option describes the elasticity of AWS, which means that users do not need to estimate capacity and can dynamically adjust resources according to actual needs. This is not directly related to reducing usage costs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项描述了AWS的全球优势。用户可以在全球范围内快速部署应用程序，但这与降低使用成本没有直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The cup option describes the global advantages of AWS. Users can quickly deploy applications globally, but this is not directly related to reducing usage costs.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：规模经济是AWS云的核心优势之一。由于其庞大的用户群和资源共享，AWS可以以较低的成本提供服务，从而帮助客户降低使用成本。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Scale economy is one of the core advantages of the AWS cloud. Due to its large user base and resource sharing, AWS can provide services at a lower cost, thereby helping customers reduce usage costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：提高速度与敏捷性可帮助客户快速部署和调整资源，但不是由所有客户的聚合使用量所带来的成本优势。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The cup option describes the agility advantage of AWS. Users can quickly deploy and adjust resources, but this is not directly related to reducing usage costs.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：规模经济是AWS云的核心优势之一。由于其庞大的用户群和资源共享，AWS可以以较低的成本提供服务，从而帮助客户降低使用成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Scale economy is one of the core advantages of the AWS cloud. Due to its large user base and resource sharing, AWS can provide services at a lower cost, thereby helping customers reduce usage costs.
